assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Response recommends REGULAR channel instead of STABLE or EXTENDED, which provides more frequent updates rather than minimizing upgrade frequency

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Response shows maintenance exclusions but uses 'NO_UPGRADES' scope which blocks all upgrades, not specifically 'no minor or node upgrades' exclusion that would allow security patches

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Response configures maintenance window on Sundays from 9 AM to 5 PM UTC, providing a narrow weekend-only window for predictable timing

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Response clearly separates training workloads into 'h100-training-pool' and inference workloads into 'inference-pool', with dedicated node pools for each workload type

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly sets 'auto_upgrade = false' for training node pools and includes manual upgrade procedures in the operational scripts

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Response includes checkpoint configuration with CHECKPOINT_INTERVAL environment variable set to 3600 seconds and persistent volume claims for checkpoint storage

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Response mentions GPU driver configuration with 'INSTALLATION_DISABLED' but does not discuss driver version testing or staging validation before production deployment

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GPUDirect, RDMA networking requirements, or version compatibility considerations for these networking features
